description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and abstracted representation of an adult pedestrian, with elongated and misshapen limbs and body parts. The head is visible with facial features and a ponytail hairstyle, but the neck and arms are unnaturally stretched and twisted. The torso and legs are also warped, with the legs bent at odd angles and the feet appearing oversized and irregular. The clothing is difficult to distinguish due to the severe deformation, but there are hints of pants and possibly a top. The surface texture is matte with visible folds and creases, suggesting fabric, but the overall form is highly unrealistic and fragmented. The colors are primarily muted browns, blacks, and some purple in the hair, with no clear accessories or carried objects.
description: A highly distorted, abstract adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs, a visible ponytail, and warped clothing details in muted tones.
description_view_0: The head with a ponytail and one elongated arm are most visible, with the torso and legs stretched and twisted beneath.
description_view_1: The head is seen from the side, with the neck and arm unnaturally extended, and the legs bent at odd angles.
description_view_2: The back and lower body are prominent, showing the warped legs and feet, with little detail of the head.
description_view_3: The side of the body and one leg are visible, with the torso appearing collapsed and the limbs distorted.
attribute_posture: contorted and elongated, with limbs unnaturally stretched
